response.title: Renewable Energy Data Analyst - Environmental Impact Specialist
response.description: EcoInnovate Solutions is at the forefront of environmental sustainability within the energy sector. We are looking for an Entry-level Renewable Energy Data Analyst - Environmental Impact Specialist who will bridge the gap between data analysis and environmental science. This role involves assessing the environmental impacts of renewable energy projects through data collection, analysis, and reporting, while working closely with engineers and environmental scientists to ensure compliance and sustainability standards are met.

required_skills: Basic proficiency in data analysis tools (Excel, R, or Python)
Understanding of renewable energy sources (solar, wind, hydro)
Knowledge of environmental regulations and compliance (NEPA, ESA)
Ability to conduct literature reviews and summarize findings
preferred_skills: Experience with statistical software (e.g., SPSS or SAS)
Basic coding skills in SQL for data querying
Experience with project management software (e.g., Asana or Trello)
Awareness of sustainability assessment frameworks (e.g., LCA)
Strong communication skills for presenting findings
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Science, Data Science, Renewable Energy, or a related field
